positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Central focus features glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and twisting, alien roots intertwining with starry night sky elements. Several small, playful, stylized celestial creatures (like stylized fireflies and winged sprites) drift through the air. The composition must have a strong, symmetrical central axis, designed for apparel printing. Use a vibrant, saturated color palette featuring deep indigos, electric teals, bioluminescent lime greens, and pops of magenta. The style should be a perfect blend of Art Nouveau flow and modern geometric tattoo art, with thick, clean outlines and flat color fills, emphasizing strong contrast and graphic appeal. Full body composition, isolated against a deep black background for maximum pop and clarity.
negative: blurry, low detail, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, poorly drawn, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, muted colors
